title: If Minecraft Didnt Suck
description: Adds Extra Features That Minecraft Wouldnt Add.
body:
**Features**
**_________________________________________________________________**

- **Mystery Bag** That you Can Get from **Wandering Villagers**
- **Magic Horns** That Are Randomly Dropped From **Mystery Bags**
- The **Horn Of Power** That Gives You All The Effects of The Other Horns
- **The Gamerule "Keep Advancments"** That (If Set To False) Removes Your Advancements On Death

Horns
**_________________________________________________________________**
**- The horn Of Agility**(Applies speed And jump Boost when Blown)
**- The Horn of The warrior**(Applies Strength When Blown)
**- The horn Of Recovery**(Applies Regeneration When Blown)
**- Horn Of Power**(Applies All Of The Effects of The Other Horns)
  *The Horn Of power Can only be Crafted, It Cant Be Found In A Mysery Bag
  ![The Horn Of Power Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00998cd65986bb21dd419d60e600fb0be85e17d8.png)
